infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Shift Tracker uses your location to calculate mileage during active shifts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Shift Tracker tracks your location in the background to accurately record mileage even when the app is minimised.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Shift Tracker tracks your location in the background to accurately record mileage.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Shift Tracker uses your camera to capture receipts and expense photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Shift Tracker accesses your photo library to attach receipt images to expenses.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationUsageDescription: Shift Tracker sends reminders about upcoming quarterly tax payment due dates.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Shift Tracker tracks your location during shifts to calculate mileage.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Shift Tracker to access your photos for receipts.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Shift Tracker to use the camera to capture receipts.
Allow Shift Tracker to use the camera.
